title: The Rescue Pushes Forward
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the rescue pushes forward.
scene: The scene focuses on the rescue pushes forward, with Zoro, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Why do you refuse to cut me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is it because I'm a woman?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So stop imitating her, you fraud!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are you seriously doubting me that much!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That won't stop me from devouring you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But if you can't match my speed

summary: The Rescue Pushes Forward. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
